sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81197" key="periglufh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περι-γλῠφή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81197.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">peeling</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:50:3:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.3.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
